TextENGNew: "Aaaaaah... Aah...!@k@vS04/36/310101109. Haaah... haaah... haaah...!!"
When I sat up... the blanket laying up to my chest fell forward and rolled down to my knees.
At the same time, beads of sweat from my forehead dripped down on the thighs of my pajamas, leaving a number of stains.
"Haaah... haaah... haaah..."
I held down my throbbing chest to remedy my hoarse breathing. My heart was pounding fast and beating hard. It really seemed like it was about to be crushed.
I couldn't stop trembling. Sweat was flowing through my whole body like a waterfall. My limbs were shaking loud enough to be audible, and the clattering of my back teeth was making a bizarre sound.
My hair was sticking to my forehead, my neck, and my cheeks, making me feel gross.
Slowly... after finally managing to catch my breath, I timidly... lifted my head.
This is... my room. Right, this is my room, in my house.
I slowly looked back at the alarm clock on the side of my desk. ...It was around 7 o'clock. The second hand continued moving like usual.
From out the window, I could hear... the cry of a sparrow. Sunlight brightly shone in through the window with the curtains open wide... telling me it was morning.
I exhaled a deep sigh of relief, large enough to empty my lungs.
...As I gradually woke up and began to recognize the view in front of me was reality, I could feel all dark and heavy emotions enveloping my heart- the despair, fear, and confusion- slowly disappear.
"Thank goodness... it was a dream...@k@vS04/36/310101115. Phew..."
Thinking about it calmly... it was a strange dream.
Mom killed Grandma after a lengthy argument, then Dad and I cooperated to hide the body.
But, when it was discovered, Mom killed Dad and tried to kill me in a fit of paranoia, attacking with a kitchen knife...
"...Ridiculous."
I shook my head and bitterly laughed at myself for being frightened by a dream.
Seriously, what a ridiculous dream. ...It was like that bad horror movie I saw on TV the other day.
No matter how strong-willed Mom is, I don't think she's the kind of person who would lose all reason and kill Grandma, and not to mention the notion of her killing Dad seems absolutely impossible.
It was so obviously unrealistic. It seemed like I took a story I saw somewhere else and replaced the characters with people I knew. It was an irresponsible nightmare.
"Haa...@k@vS04/36/310101118. I'm sweaty and sticky..."

I looked at my pajamas. They were drenched with sweat like they'd been through rain. This might have been the first time in my life I experienced a night sweat like this. The sheets were damp too. It was a little uncomfortable.
Mom will have to wash these sheets... And I'll have to dry off the bed...
I got off the bed, tossed the blanket to my desk, and yanked the sheet off. There was a huge stain on top of the thin mattress, so I folded it into quarters, intending to wash it too.
"But I wonder if it'll dry by the end of the day...?"
Since we have a large washer, we can even wash futons. But when it comes to drying it off, that depends on the weather. ...I thought that while walking towards the window, then opened it.
...A refreshing morning breeze blew in, the sun shining bright while hanging low in the sky.
I tilted my head back and looked up at the sky. ...There were only a few scattered clouds. It looked like today would be a nice day. So for now, I didn't need to worry about the laundry.
"...This feels nice."
The break of dawn had already passed, but... I think this was the first time in a long time that I woke up this early.
I'm always making preparations for tomorrow's classes late at night while listening to the radio, so I habitually stay in bed until the last minute in the morning.
Even so, I went to school on Monday morning feeling half asleep, but... for some reason, my head was clear today and I didn't feel sleepy at all.
Well, back in Hinamizawa, I woke up at this time without anyone waking me up, so it wasn't a big deal or anything...
Enough of that. ...I murmured that while shaking my head, then sighed.
That's right. I've thrown away my ties to Hinamizawa. So it doesn't matter what happened in the past. I'll forget everything, cast off the shackles... and live as a resident of this city.

And I'll study more and more. I'll fight against the people around me and narrowly pull ahead of them, just like everyone else in the city... and do my best to get into the same university as Akira-kun.
...That may be impossible. It might be too late now.
...No! That's what other people decided on their own. I won't accept that nonsense anymore. I'll believe in myself and earn my own happiness right here, right now. For sure!
So... Hinamizawa doesn't matter anymore. It won't interfere with my life ever again.
No matter who asks, no matter what the question is... they'll never find out.
I'm a resident of this town, Natsumi Kimiyoshi.
No... I'll throw away the name "Kimiyoshi" too.
I'm "Natsumi." That's all. That alone is enough.
From now on, I want everyone... even Akira-kun... to call me "Natsumi." By doing that, I can throw away everything tying me to Hinamizawa.
And I can live happily in this city...!
"......That's right, Akira-kun..."
I suddenly recalled the previous day.
During our precious date... I suddenly fell ill and Akira-kun brought me back here.
When I head to school, I'll apologize right away. And next time, I'll be the one to invite him on a date.
I'll wear more beautiful, more fashionable clothes. ...I know, I'll look into the best restaurants in the city until that day comes.
I'll thoroughly prepare myself... I'll do my absolute best to make Akira-kun happy.
Then he'll surely acknowledge me.
He will love me more and more...
"...Alright."
Feeling fired up, I energetically nodded.
...It all begins here.
The story of the new me trying my best...
"All right then,@k@vS04/36/310101125. .........What's that?"
I opened my door with the futon and sheets in hand, but as soon as I entered the hallway by the stairs... I frowned at the bizarre air I was faced with.
What in the world... was this heavy air? And... it smelled fishy... You could say it smelled like a beast.
Suddenly... my nightmare from a little while ago came back to my mind. I sternly shook it off and walked down the hallway.
I'm overthinking this.
My dream a little while ago was really shocking, so it must still be haunting me, that's all.
That's right... it's impossible. Isn't it?
For my whole family to have been killed... and me being the sole survivor.
You'd think that if my whole family was murdered, I'd be no exception to that, wouldn't I?
I would've been killed in my sleep... like by being stabbed, or strangled, or something.
But... I'm still alive. If that's the case, isn't that proof that nothing happened? Wouldn't that be the case?
Also... even though I occasionally hear about these sorts of gruesome incidents on TV, they don't happen just anywhere at any time.
They happen to someone very unlucky... to families with no connection to me that live far away from this city.
So it couldn't happen around me.
It definitely couldn't happen...!
They say that a murder is the kind of thing that happens near you only once in a lifetime.
Well, I already experienced an incident like that... so I shouldn't come across another one ever again, right?
I can say with confidence that the possibility of it happening twice in a lifetime is almost zero, right?
Say it.
Someone, please say it's so.
Please reassure me that nothing strange will happen around me ever again!!
"Haa... haah...!"
My heart was violently beating again, slamming hard against my chest from the inside. I could barely breathe. Almost like I was being strangled and my trachea was getting crushed.
...Despite that, I mustered my willpower and walked down the hallway, reinvigorating my fading senses... Finally, I reached the stairs.
And slowly, placing careful pressure into the soles of my feet, I made my way downstairs one step at a time.
Tap.
Tap... tap. ...Pat
Tap... tap... tap. ...Pat... pat... pat.
That's strange.
That's really strange.
Why do I hear another set of footsteps... after my own?
There shouldn't be... anyone on the second floor right now.
Mom should be making breakfast while Dad watches the morning news in the living room at this hour.
And of course, Grandma never takes the stairs, so she must be on the first floor...
Tap.
...Pat.
Tap... tap.
...Pat... pat.
Then... what are these footsteps? Whose footsteps are they?
Also... those... footsteps!
They make a squeaky, sticky sound like they're stepping on chewing gum, and they're following behind me... What are they?!
And... and then!
Who is this presence... looming right behind me?!
Tap.
...Pat.
The fear felt like it was crushing my entire body. Unable to handle the anxiety, I... stopped in place with only a few steps left to go.
It was right behind me, following me.
It remained silent... but I still sensed it behind me, holding its faint breath.
Don't turn around.
It's pointless.
Because there is nothing behind me, nobody is there.
Right? Hey, isn't that the case?
A shiver ran down my spine... The cold sweat that ought to have run out once again oozed out and slid down my cold skin.
The backs of my ears were burning hot.
Then, just beside my neck, I felt the air move in a way that couldn't be the wind...!
...Pat.
I definitely heard that footstep... The presence approaching me from behind... went silent... and stopped again.
What can I do?
What should I do?
That's... simple.
...I should just turn around.
...Just turn around and check.
...Confirm that nothing's there so I can put my mind at ease.
Then it'll all be over.
Then my everyday life will go back to normal.
Come on... turn around.
And see with your own eyes that it isn't there.
What am I afraid of?
There's nothing behind me. Nobody is there.
Just look at it and make sure.
Look, it's simple, isn't it?
Just turn your head and look behind you. Then you'll feel much better.
Go on, turn around.
Don't make me say it over and over...... turn around already!
Then I'll see!!
Come on, look quickly!!
Look look look look look look look look look look look look look look look look look look look look look look.
Heeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheeheehee.
Hihehirahuhihyahahigigugyahahigigugyagegegegegegegegegegegegegegegegegege!!!
"...Nooooo!!!"
My body leaned forward as if repelled... As a result, I missed a step, slipped, and fell.

Fortunately, I wasn't too high up and the futon I was carrying cushioned my landing, so I reached the first floor with light bumps on the knees. Then I timidly looked up toward the second floor... and saw nothing there.
I breathed a sigh of relief. ...I should have just done as the voice said then.
I bitterly laughed in astonishment at my cowardice as I picked up the dropped futon, opened the sliding door leading to the living room, and stepped inside...
What is this......?!
What is this?! What on earth is thiiis?!
The noxious smell that had accumulated in that sealed space blew through the doorway... I inhaled it all at once after screaming... and vomited on the spot.
Even though it was already morning, neither the lights nor the TV were on. The room was dark.
Pieces of furniture and scraps of cloth or something were scattered across the room.
Splashes of something gushing out echoed.
And... on the floor...... I saw two people... in unnatural poses with their limbs sprawled out...... literally scattered about...!
Coming back to my senses, I ran over to one of them and touched their shoulder.
This is a bad joke!
Or a terrible dream!
Mom and Dad are both just doing this to surprise me!
So, when I get closer and look at her face, surely Mom will...
"Eeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeek!!!"
The moment her face turned toward me, I caught a glimpse of Mom's aloof eyes.
But... her pupils were hidden under her eyelids... What I saw were the whites of her eyes, her blood vessels risen to the surface!
"M-M-Mo-Moooooooooooom...!!!"
I lost all strength in my knees and fell backwards. ...And just then, I felt something slippery and warm against my palm.
I reflexively raised my hand up and held it in front of my eyes...... to discover everything from my hand to elbow was stained with dark, murky, red blood......!!
"Nooooooo!! Aaaaaaahh!!!"
I screamed, shouted, cried, panicked, widened my eyes, and frantically held my hand against the wall and pushed hard to lift my upper body.
However, my arms gave out, and I slipped and fell onto my shoulder... right in front of Dad's face...!!
"...Aaahh... gah, gaaaaahh...!!!"

I gasped and unleashed an enraptured scream that burned the back of my throat. Unable to speak any further... I crawled on all fours to the other side of the room, and tumbled through the exit into the next room.
"...Aah, haah... haaah... ah...?"
My vision distorted and narrowed as I felt myself on the brink of fainting, and at that moment, I clearly saw Grandma sitting quietly in the corner of the room, in front of the altar.
She seemed to be offering prayers to Oyashiro-sama's altar, seeking salvation from this bloodstained hell.
"Grandma! M-Mom is! Dad is!!"
Even though it was difficult to breathe, I wrenched my voice and called out to Grandma. But Grandma just kept praying without reacting as though she hadn't heard me.
"H-he-he-help...!@k@vS04/36/310101150. Grandma, help me...!!"

"I-I believe what you've been saying!@k@vS04/36/310101152. From now on, I'll pray to Oyashiro-sama with all my heart!!@k@vS04/36/310101153. I won't talk about abandoning Hinamizawa anymore!!@k@vS04/36/310101154. I promise!"
"So, please forgive me already!!@k@vS04/36/310101156. Please do it!!!"
Then, as soon as I shook her shoulder.
...Her head came loose... and fell to the ground.
What does this mean?
What's happening here?!
Is it because I wished for this back then?
The curse came for me because I abandoned Hinamizawa and denied everything?!
Wrong! This is all wrong! This isn't what I wanted!
I lunged out of the room in a trance, ran to the door at the entrance, and clung to the doorknob!!
I unlocked it, and clatter clatter clatter clatter clatter clatter clatter clatter turn turn turn turn turn turn turn tuuuurn!!
"Huh?!@k@vS04/36/310101163. What?!@k@vS04/36/310101164. Why won't it opeeeeeeen?!"
The door's unlocked! It's unlocked! So why won't it open?!
Bang bang bang bang bang bang bang bang bang!!!
"Open!@k@vS04/36/310101166. Open up!!@k@vS04/36/310101167. Let me out of here!!@k@vS04/36/310101168. Help!@k@vS04/36/310101169. Open!@k@vS04/36/310101170. Open open open open open opeeeeeen!!!"
Even when I shouted, even when I screamed, even when I cried and begged, the door stood firm and would not let me out. And then,
"...Eeeeeeek!!"
......Pat, pat.
......It's coming...
It's getting closer...
That thing is going to catch me...
And drag me out of here to pull me apart and grind me into pieces like everyone else...
No I don't want to die I didn't do anything so why is this happening forgive me I'm sorry someone forgive meeeeeeeeee!!
Someone.
"Someone, help meeeeeeee!!!!"
Please...
